name: Loy Kaew First Love
overview: Loy, a kind-hearted farmer´s son, falls for Kaew, the village headman´s son and his close friend. Their romance faces challenges from Kaew´s sister and Phat, who both love Loy, as Phat vows to destroy him. Kaew must choose whether to protect Loy.
